pageContext.name: The Nun 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: This third scarily tempting Chibi® Coin in the Horror Series is for the 2018 American gothic supernatural horror film made by Warner Bros., The Nun.  The coin is a colored and shaped Chibi version of the chilling nun in full habit – who can forget her chalky-white skin, piercing yellow eyes, and sharp fangs? Despite this unsettling image, it is a still legal tender coin with a mintage of only 2,000. The Public Seal of Niue is featured on the obverse along with confirmation that the coin is indeed 1oz of pure silver.  With packaging to match, this is the perfect creepy collectible for any fan. A window in the box allows you to easily display the horror inside!  Uncover one for yourself!
